final:
module dot_product (
    input [4:0] invalid_vector,
    input [4:0] vector_b,
    output [9:0] dot_product_out
);
    assign dot_product_out = invalid_vector[0]*vector_b[0] + 
                             invalid_vector[1]*vector_b[1] + 
                             invalid_vector[2]*vector_b[2] + 
                             invalid_vector[3]*vector_b[3] + 
                             invalid_vector[4]*vector_b[4];
endmodule
